templates.name: Mutual NDA
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (main body) for exchanging confidential information between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page for the Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, capturing party details and deal-specific variables.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement for providers offering cloud-based software services to customers.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early collaboration between a startup and a design partner co-developing a product.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments, service credits, and support levels for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for engagements involving consulting, implementation, or other professional services.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement for a processor handling personal data on behalf of a controller under GDPR and similar laws.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software to a customer.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for reseller, referral, and other go-to-market partnerships between two companies.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for a time-boxed evaluation of a product or service before entering into a longer-term agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA-covered entities and their business associates handling protected health information.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum layered onto an existing agreement to cover use of AI features, training data, and model outputs.
